rationale.fidelity: Preserves the single-threshold model, latent creator quality, noisy score mechanism, error-loss objective, and absence of perfect screening.
rationale.managerial_framing: Covers the decision structure and operational trade-off thoroughly, with slightly less concrete implementation detail than a full managerial brief.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Rejects label-only novelty and specifies credible mechanism, method, data-identification, or implementation additions, while correctly requiring comparison with prior work.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly separates missing literature, empirical calibration, and implementation evidence from supplied model structure.
rationale.prose_clarity: Accurate and organized but dense, repetitive, and affected by encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A highly faithful diagnosis with a defensible bounded account of what a real contribution would require; no hard failure applies.
